---
title: "Willoughby M. Burslem F.R.C.P."
---

## Willoughby M. Burslem F.R.C.P.

**Dates:** (b.1809/10)

### Description

physician, of Bournemouth

### Biography

Mentioned as attending the Kebles in their last illness.

### Letters

- Letter from April 5. 1866.
- Letter from Good Friday [30 March], 1866

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
